description: IFRC DREF Quality Control Rubric organized by form sections - aligned with Dref model fields

operation_overview.name: Operation Overview
operation_overview.description: Initial overview section of the DREF form

criteria.criterion: The targeted areas are clearly defined
criteria.guidance: Specify geographic areas (districts, regions, provinces) that will receive assistance

criteria.criterion: The event is clearly classified according to the IFRC Crisis Categorisation
criteria.guidance: Classify as Yellow, Orange, or Red based on IFRC crisis categorization framework

criteria.criterion: A map of the affected area(s) is included
criteria.guidance: Include a clear map showing affected areas and operational coverage

criteria.criterion: Information from lessons learnt from previous operations, if available, have informed the planning of the operational strategy
criteria.guidance: Reference previous similar operations and how lessons have been incorporated

criteria.criterion: The event is clearly explained in terms of when, where and what occurred or is expected to occur
criteria.guidance: Provide clear timeline, location, and nature of the disaster event

criteria.criterion: The date of disaster/trigger date is specified in the application
criteria.guidance: Specify the exact date when the disaster occurred or trigger threshold was met

criteria.criterion: The scope and scale of the event is clearly detailed and provides enough information to justify the DREF allocation
criteria.guidance: Include number of affected people, households, geographic extent, and severity indicators

criteria.criterion: The number of affected people is clearly stated
criteria.guidance: Provide the total number of people affected by the disaster

criteria.criterion: Photos have been included to show the damages caused by the disaster and/or National Societies actions
criteria.guidance: Include relevant photos documenting impact and response activities

criteria.criterion: It is clear whether the information is coming as a result of a needs assessment by the National Society, or secondary data with clear sources
criteria.guidance: Clearly cite data sources - primary assessment, government data, UN reports, etc.

criteria.criterion: General coordination mechanisms in place, if any, are mentioned and explained
criteria.guidance: Describe cluster coordination, government coordination, and other coordination mechanisms

criteria.criterion: Coordination with ICRC/PNS and other organisations is well explained
criteria.guidance: Describe coordination mechanisms with ICRC, Partner National Societies, and other humanitarian actors

criteria.criterion: IFRC coordination and support is described
criteria.guidance: Detail IFRC involvement and support to the National Society

criteria.criterion: ICRC coordination is described if applicable
criteria.guidance: Detail ICRC involvement if present in the operation

criteria.criterion: Partner National Society support is described
criteria.guidance: Detail support from Partner National Societies

criteria.criterion: Coordination with national authorities is described
criteria.guidance: Describe government coordination and support

criteria.criterion: The activities done so far by the National Society are clearly explained
criteria.guidance: Detail immediate response actions taken by the National Society

criteria.criterion: The needs analysis provided is clear, gender and diversity disaggregated and based on data
criteria.guidance: Provide needs assessment data disaggregated by gender, age, and vulnerability

criteria.criterion: Any current gaps of information regarding the needs of the population are mentioned in the application and explanation is provided on how this gap will be filled
criteria.guidance: Acknowledge data gaps and explain how additional assessments will be conducted

criteria.criterion: The overall objective of the operation is clearly stated
criteria.guidance: Provide a clear overall objective for the operation

criteria.criterion: The explanation provided in the rationale regarding the operational strategy of the National Society clearly explains the connection with the needs of the population
criteria.guidance: Link operational activities directly to identified needs

criteria.criterion: The number of targeted people and targeted areas are clear and coherent throughout the document
criteria.guidance: Ensure targeting numbers are consistent across all sections

criteria.criterion: The selection criteria of targeted people and targeted area(s) are clearly explained, and they ensure National Society's impartiality
criteria.guidance: Define transparent, needs-based selection criteria

criteria.criterion: Description of people to be assisted is provided
criteria.guidance: Describe who will receive assistance and why

criteria.criterion: The capacity of the National Society to implement the proposed operation is clearly explained, including their experience implementing similar interventions
criteria.guidance: Describe NS capacity, number of volunteers and staff involved

criteria.criterion: The logistics capacity of the National Society is explained
criteria.guidance: Describe the logistics capacity to deliver the operation

criteria.criterion: All proposed activities are directly linked to the specific disaster or crisis of this request
criteria.guidance: Ensure all activities are relevant to the current emergency

criteria.criterion: Security and safety concerns are identified, and measures/rules are in place to mitigate the risk
criteria.guidance: Identify security risks and mitigation measures

criteria.criterion: Risk security assessment has been completed
criteria.guidance: Provide risk security information including risks and mitigations

criteria.criterion: Surge deployment status is indicated
criteria.guidance: Indicate if surge personnel will be deployed

criteria.criterion: Monitoring and evaluation approach is explained
criteria.guidance: Include M&E approach and reporting schedule

criteria.criterion: Communication strategy is explained
criteria.guidance: Include communication plan for the operation

criteria.criterion: Operation timeframe is specified
criteria.guidance: Specify the duration of the operation in months

criteria.criterion: NS request date is specified
criteria.guidance: Date when National Society submitted the request

criteria.criterion: Amount requested is specified and justified
criteria.guidance: Specify the total amount being requested

criteria.criterion: Budget file is attached with itemized details
criteria.guidance: Attach detailed budget file with unit costs for all items

criteria.criterion: Number of items, kits, distributions is consistent with the targeting strategy
criteria.guidance: Ensure budget quantities match targeted beneficiary numbers

criteria.criterion: National Society contact information is provided
criteria.guidance: Provide NS contact name, email, and phone number

criteria.criterion: IFRC Appeal Manager contact information is provided
criteria.guidance: Provide IFRC appeal manager details

criteria.criterion: Child safeguarding risk analysis assessment has been completed
criteria.guidance: Confirm child safeguarding assessment completion

criteria.criterion: Anti-fraud and corruption policy is in place
criteria.guidance: Confirm NS has anti-fraud and corruption policy

accept.label: Accept
accept.description: The field meets the quality criteria

dont_accept.label: Don't Accept
dont_accept.description: The field does not meet the quality criteria and requires improvement
